title: Market Brief — Sunday, June 21, 2026
summary: GPU supply is loosening fast across every class. Util-avail stands at 26% for A100, 44% for H100, 48% for H200, and 51% for B200, with all four SKUs shedding 12 to 36 percentage points of utilization in 30 days. H200 spot jumped 6.6% day-over-day to $3.42/hr despite collapsing demand, a volatility spike (139.8% annualized) that screams illiquid book, not genuine tightening.
paragraphs: GPU supply is loosening fast across every class. Util-avail stands at 26% for A100, 44% for H100, 48% for H200, and 51% for B200, with all four SKUs shedding 12 to 36 percentage points of utilization in 30 days. H200 spot jumped 6.6% day-over-day to $3.42/hr despite collapsing demand, a volatility spike (139.8% annualized) that screams illiquid book, not genuine tightening.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), running Llama 70B on H100 costs roughly $8.31/M tokens. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output and Meta Llama 3.3 70B at $0.32/M are selling at losses exceeding $7/M tokens, burning cash to hold share. Grades: OpenAI Strong on premium tiers, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash, open-source providers Burning Cash.

B200 is overvalued at $4.29/hr spot given 51% util-avail and the steepest 30-day utilization drop of any GPU class at 36 percentage points. Best risk-adjusted trade: buy A100 capacity at $1.07/hr where 74% utilization signals real organic demand, and sell inference on premium-tier endpoints capturing 88%+ margins.
bullets: 51% util-avail on B200 with a 36.1pp utilization drop in 30 days signals approaching oversupply.
26% util-avail on A100 makes it the tightest GPU class, the only SKU still near the scarcity threshold.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier output tokens cost 78% less than GPT-4 launch pricing.
$0.18/M output for OpenAI gpt-oss-120b is the cheapest frontier-class token ever listed.
139.8% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI is more than double B200 and triple A100.
$46 per DDR5 16Gb chip rose 1.32% week-over-week, a modest tailwind for new GPU build costs.
